Info

Welcome to CodeMacabre! This is the personal site of Myles Lewando (pronounced le-van-doe), a developer, educator, and data visualisation and accessibility specialist.

Myles is a disability and mental health rights activist, and is passionate about inclusive, ethical technology, and data justice. He uses he/him pronouns, mostly.

Roles and memberships

Alongside a day-job as a front-end developer, Myles is also involved in other activities. These include:

  • Member of the Mental Health Inequalities Advisory Group for Welsh Government's Health & Social Care Committee (July 2022 - present)
  • Disabilities Officer at United Tech and Allied Workers (UTAW) (May 2022 - present)
  • Member of Welsh Government's Cross-Party Group on Digital Rights and Democracy (Feb 2022 - present)

Fun facts

Myles has a menagerie of multi- and no-legged pets, ranging from Giant African Land Snails, various species of millipedes, tarantulas, a pair of blue death-feigning beetles, and occasionally, stick insects. And one human child.

As morbid as it sounds, Myles loves graveyards, crypts and catacombs. Where possible, he tries to visit weird and unusual ones, or just take a quiet walk around a local one.

Contact

Send Myles an email or find him on Twitter (and most other places) as @codemacabre.

© 2022 Myles Lewando
